message:
test(ui): Comprehensive UI and theme system test coverage

Adds extensive test coverage for the theme system, WCAG accessibility
compliance, and UI component behavior (beads pmb.2, yln.3):

Theme System Tests:
- ThemePreset::all() iteration coverage
- from_str parsing for all preset names
- Light/dark/high-contrast palette instantiation
- Invalid preset name rejection

WCAG Accessibility Tests:
- Relative luminance calculation accuracy
- Contrast ratio computation validation
- AA/AALarge/AAA compliance thresholds
- Dark theme text readability verification
- High contrast mode WCAG AAA compliance

Highlight Style Tests:
- highlight_style_bg_uses_accent_color: Verifies highlight
  background uses the theme's accent color
- detail_highlight_uses_themed_accent: Confirms themed
  accents provide readable contrast
- Saturation verification for visual distinctiveness

Input Mode Tests (yln.3):
- InputMode::DetailFind variant existence
- Mode inequality verification
- All InputMode variants covered

Role Styling Tests (yln.3):
- role_style returns correct foreground colors
- User/Agent/Tool/System/Other role coverage
- Theme consistency across all presets
- Palette color mapping accuracy

These tests ensure the theme system produces accessible,
visually consistent results across all supported presets
and that UI components behave correctly in all input modes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
